metadata.raw: {"ID":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/403","TITLE":"The Bankruptcy and Diligence etc. (Decrees for Removing from Heritable Property) (Scotland) Amendment Order 2025","LINK (SELF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/id/ssi/2025/403","LINK":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made","LINK (XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.xml","LINK (RDF/XML)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.rdf","LINK (AKN)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.akn","LINK (HTML snippet)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.xht","LINK (Website (XHTML) Default View)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.htm","LINK (PDF)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/made/data.pdf","LINK (Table of Contents)":"http://www.legislation.gov.uk/ssi/2025/403/contents/made","AUTHOR":"","UPDATED":"2025-12-18T12:57:51Z","PUBLISHED":"2025-12-18T12:52:44.146325Z","DocumentMainType":"ScottishStatutoryInstrument","YEAR":"2025","NUMBER":"403","ISBN":"'9780111064726'","AlternativeNumber":"","CreationDate":"2025-12-16","SUBJECT":"LANDLORD AND TENANT","Supersedes":"","CATEGORY":"LANDLORD AND TENANT","SUMMARY":"Part 15 of the Bankruptcy and Diligence etc. (Scotland) Act 2007 (“the 2007 Act”) sets out the general procedures which are to be followed when removing a person from heritable property. Section 214(2) of the 2007 Act contains a list of the decrees, orders and warrants which are covered by the general procedures.","":""}
